Table employee with columns Employee_ID (int), Name (text), Age (int), City (text)
Table evaluation with columns Employee_ID (text), Year_awarded (text), Bonus (real) — references: employee(Employee_ID)
Table hiring with columns Shop_ID (int), Employee_ID (int), Start_from (text), Is_full_time (bool) — references: employee(Employee_ID), shop(Shop_ID)
